title: ViewBoatItems
description: Shows the items in your hands while paddling a boat
body:
![Title of View Boat Items](https://github.com/n8-M4x/ViewBoatItems/blob/e050801ecbc0bdb7db0ebf96a3c9cd1adfa58d19/title.png?raw=true)
# View Boat Items
This Fabric mod makes your items in your main and offhand visible when you are moving in a boat, whereas normally, they would disappear.

![Example of boating with Items visible](https://github.com/n8-M4x/ViewBoatItems/blob/d509ffc2f8b1d56d17dab364ab565a5faaa8a9d7/viewboatitems.GIF?raw=true)

This is a lightweight mod without needing to configure anything. It can help when going for a buried treasure and any other boat navigation with maps.
